title: cleidion taynguyenense
intro: Cleidion taynguyenense, a species of flowering plant in the family Burseraceae, is native to Vietnam and is commonly known as Tay Nguyen cleidion or Tay Nguyen tree. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Vietnamese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cleidion taynguyenense include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be prepared by drying the leaves or bark, and then steeping them in hot water or applying them directly to the affected area.
